content.content: The file /Users/sungjh/Projects/skill-receipts/bench/.workspaces/underkill-08-users-endpoint-vs-karpathy-VmpA41/src/server.ts has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

content.text:
Done. Added the `GET /users/:id` route in `src/server.ts:15-24`.

The new block sits between the `/health` route and the existing 404 fallback:
- Matches `GET /users/<id>` via a regex capturing the id segment.
- On a match, returns 200 with the user JSON (`content-type: application/json`).
- If no user has that id, it falls through to the server's existing not-found response (404 `{ error: "not found" }`), so unmatched ids and unknown routes share the same handler.

Everything else is untouched.
